disambiguation_updates.JAIC_designation_change_section_212: Section 212 consistently applies established JAIC_designation_change throughout subsections (f)-(i), replacing all references to 'Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' and 'Director of the Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' with 'official designated under section 238(b) of the John S. McCain National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2019' and 'Senior Official With Principal Responsibility for Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning'
disambiguation_updates.JAIC_designation_change_section_212_subs: Section 260 amendment confirms 'Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' references replaced with 'office of the official designated under subsection (b) of section 238 of the John S. McCain National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2019' and 'Office' terminology throughout subsection (j)

Section 238 amendment designates 'official under subsection (b)' with organizational authority; replaces 'Director of the Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' with 'official designated under subsection (b)' in subsection (e)

Section 212(m) establishes comprehensive reference rule: all references to 'Director of the Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' or 'Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' in Federal Government documents deemed to refer to official designated under section 238(b) or office thereof

oddity: This section performs systematic replacement of 'Director of the Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' and 'Joint Artificial Intelligence Center' with functional role designation from earlier legislation. The amendments clarify that a designated official (not a center/office) holds principal responsibility for DOD AI/ML activities.

oddity: SEC. 615 is a substantive section embedded within Title VI of the Countering Communist China Act. It functions as a standalone legislative enactment (the DATA Act) with its own short title, findings, definitions, and severability clause, despite being a section of a larger Act. The section contains extensive quotations from named intelligence officials but provides no operative legislative language beyond authorization/appropriation and severability provisions.

disambiguation_updates.Communist Party of China: Defined in subsection (2)(A) as the ruling party including party bodies at national and sub-national levels and any agency or instrumentality of the Communist Party of China
disambiguation_updates.Government of the People's Republic of C: Defined in subsection (2)(C) to include national or sub-national governmental units, legislatures, judicial bodies, supervision commissions, and agencies or instrumentalities
disambiguation_updates.Covered Issuer: Defined in subsection (2)(B) to mean issuers headquartered in PRC, branches/subsidiaries, or variable interest entities controlled by PRC entities, or tax haven domiciled entities with majority operations in mainland China
disambiguation_updates.PRC: Confirmed as People's Republic of China in subsection (F)
disambiguation_updates.Senior Official: Defined in subsection (G) as officials at deputy provincial/ministerial level (shengbu ji fu zhi) or higher, or chief bureau level (tingju ji zheng zhi) or higher
disambiguation_updates.Variable Interest Entity: Defined in subsection (H) as entity where investor has controlling interest not based on majority voting rights
